name: Pignoli Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the sugar, flour, and salt.
2. In a medium bowl, break up the almond paste with a wooden spoon.
3. Add the egg whites to the almond paste mixture and beat until fairly smooth.
4. Stir in the flour mixture.
5. Drop slightly rounded teaspoonfuls of dough 2 inches apart onto two lightly greased cookie sheets.
6. Press pignoli nuts into the cookies.
7. Bake at 300°F for 20-25 minutes, or until golden brown.
8. Remove from oven and let cool on a rack.
